name: Calculadora Deposito Prazo
desc: Calcule Interest = Capital × (1 + Rate/n)^(n×t) - Capital. Exemplo: €10,000 at 3.5% annual, 1 year, monthly compounding = Interest = €355.77; Total = €10,355.77....

Forgetting to compare with inflation for real returns
